product_overview: Life OS is a personal productivity web app that unifies tasks, habits, finances, onboarding and user settings with integrated AI assistance and gamification. It provides hybrid task management (Kanban + sortable lists), premium dashboards, and a unified user hub for profile and preferences.
core_goals: Unify tasks, habits, finances and user profile into a single cohesive web app
Provide a flexible task management experience (Kanban + sortable list) with persistent ordering
Surface actionable insights via premium dashboards and AI-assisted quick capture
Increase engagement through gamification (XP, levels, streaks) and visual feedback
Deliver performant, accessible UI with optimistic updates and robust validation

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User sign-in and sign-up flows to establish authenticated sessions and gate protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /tasks -> See user avatar in topbar
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> See inline error "Invalid credentials" -> Remain on /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Sign up -> See onboarding start at /onboarding -> Account created
Navigate to /register -> Fill email already in use -> Click Sign up -> See inline error "Email already registered" -> Remain on /register

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Guided initial setup that runs after first sign-up to configure profile, preferences and initial data.
user_flows: After sign up redirect to /onboarding -> See step 1 content -> Fill required fields -> Click Next -> Complete all steps -> See completion confirmation -> Redirect to /tasks
Navigate to /onboarding -> Leave a required field blank -> Click Next -> See field validation error -> Cannot proceed until fixed

features.name: Unified User Hub
features.description: Consolidated profile and settings management (Identity, Security, Preferences) with profile updates persisted via API.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Click Identity tab -> Update avatar -> Update bio -> Click Save -> See success toast -> Updated avatar and bio displayed
Navigate to /settings -> Navigate between tabs (Identity, Security, Preferences) -> Click Security tab -> Enter new password and confirm -> Click Save -> See success toast
Navigate to /settings -> Click Security tab -> Enter weak password -> Click Save -> See inline validation error -> Changes not saved
Navigate to /settings -> Click Preferences tab -> Toggle a preference -> Click Save -> See preferences persisted on page reload

features.name: Hybrid Task Management
features.description: Create, view and manage tasks using a Kanban board or a sortable list with Lexorank persistence, RHF validation for creation, drag-and-drop reordering and completion feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Toggle between List and Kanban views -> Click Create Task -> Fill title and description (RHF validation) -> Click Submit -> See new task in Todo column/list
Navigate to /tasks -> Toggle between List and Kanban views -> Drag a task card from Todo to In Progress -> See task move in UI -> API PATCH returns success
Navigate to /tasks -> Toggle between List and Kanban views -> Drag a task card to Done -> See confetti animation -> See task status updated to done
Navigate to /tasks -> Toggle to List view -> Create a new task -> Leave title blank -> Click Submit -> See RHF validation error inline -> Task not created
Navigate to /tasks -> Reorder tasks in list view via drag and drop -> See optimistic UI reorder -> Server save fails -> See error toast -> Order reverts to previous state

features.name: Premium Dashboards (Finances & Visualizations)
features.description: Financial dashboards and habit visualizations using Tremor charts to show cash flow, category breakdowns and habit consistency trackers.
user_flows: Navigate to /finances -> See cash flow area charts -> See spending by category donut chart -> Adjust date filter -> Charts update with new data

Navigate to /finances -> Click Add Transaction -> Fill amount and description -> Click Suggest Category (AI) -> See suggested category -> Click Save -> See transaction appear in table and charts update

Navigate to /finances -> Click Add Transaction -> Fill fields -> Click Suggest Category (AI) -> AI suggestion API fails -> See error toast "Category suggestion failed" -> Manually select category -> Save transaction
Navigate to /finances -> Open summary cards -> See balance and daily spend values displayed

features.name: Habits
features.description: Daily habit tracking with optimistic completion updates, heatmap and streak analytics, and CRUD for habits.
user_flows: Navigate to /habits -> See habit list with checkboxes -> Click checkbox for a habit -> See optimistic update (checkbox checked) -> See heatmap and streak values update
Navigate to /habits -> Click Create Habit -> Fill title, frequency and time of day -> Click Save -> See new habit added to list
Navigate to /habits -> Click Create Habit -> Leave title blank -> Click Save -> See validation error inline -> Habit not created
Navigate to /habits -> Click existing habit -> Edit target value -> Click Save -> See updated values reflected in habit card and analytics

features.name: AI Assistant (Quick Capture & Chat)
features.description: AI-powered quick capture parsing and chat interface accessible from a floating action control to create tasks or suggest actions.
user_flows: From any page (e.g., navigate to /tasks) -> Click FAB -> Chat modal opens -> Type "Create task: Buy milk tomorrow" -> Click Send -> See parsed preview from AI -> Click Confirm -> New task appears in /tasks

From any page (e.g., navigate to /tasks) -> Click FAB -> Chat modal opens -> Type freeform query -> Click Send -> See AI response with suggested actions -> Click an action (e.g., create task) -> Confirm action executed
From any page (e.g., navigate to /tasks) -> Click FAB -> Type message -> Click Send -> AI parse API times out -> See error toast "AI request failed" -> Option to retry appears

features.name: University (Courses & Assignments)
features.description: Course and assignment management with grade calculations and a What-If simulator to project outcomes.
user_flows: Open University module from sidebar -> See course cards with current average grade -> Click a course card -> See assignment list and grade totals -> Add assignment with grade and weight -> See course average recalculated
Open University module -> Click What-If simulator -> Enter hypothetical grade for an assignment -> Click Calculate -> See projected final grade
Open University module -> Add assignment -> Leave required fields blank -> Click Save -> See validation error -> Assignment not created

features.name: Journal
features.description: Daily journaling and mood tracking with simple create, view and persist flows.
user_flows: Open Journal from sidebar -> Click New Entry -> Write content -> Click Save -> See new journal entry in list with timestamp
Open Journal from sidebar -> Click New Entry -> Leave content empty -> Click Save -> See validation error "Content required" -> Entry not saved

features.name: Gamification (Points, Levels, Streaks)
features.description: Points, levels and streak tracking surfaced across the app to motivate users and reward completion of habits and tasks.
user_flows: Complete a habit from /habits -> See immediate points increment and streak update in UI -> Navigate to /settings -> View XP and level progress -> See updated XP
Complete a task in /tasks -> Expect confetti and points awarded -> See level progress bar increment
Force a points-award operation to fail (server error) -> See error toast and no XP increment -> UI reverts to previous points value

routes.description: Task management with Kanban and Sortable List

features.name: Hybrid Task Management
features.description: Manage tasks via Kanban or sortable list with Lexorank persistence
user_interactions: Toggle between List and Kanban views
Create a new task with RHF validation
Reorder tasks in list view via drag and drop
Complete a task to trigger confetti

features.name: Premium Dashboards
features.description: Financial and health data visualization using Tremor
user_interactions: Check spending by category donut chart
